title: Gun Core Fancy's Patch
description: A modification of Gamingbarns Gun Core made to have extra capabilities, while being compatible with normal gun core
body:
# DISCLAIMER
## this DOES NOT add any usable guns to the game, this is a library for a future pack
### This is a modified version of [Gamingbarn's Gun Core](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gun-core)
This is Gamingbarns gun core, with the standard features to add guns to the game, but with some extras that I have added, this will be updated when I make a project that needs it to be updated

### To use this patched version generators to make guns will be made soon

<details>
<summary>Current Modifications</summary>
  
- The Ability to have multiple ammo items for a gun
  
- The ability for ammo to change the stats of the gun*

(Things marked with a ```*``` are experimental
</details>
